platform_warnings: End-of-life platform; verify IOS image feature set (e.g. securityk9, datak9) for advanced features.

feature_warnings.etherchannel: EtherChannel is not typically available on onboard router ports of this platform.
feature_warnings.layer2: Switchport commands require an EtherSwitch service module; onboard ports are routed only.
feature_warnings.svi: SVIs require an EtherSwitch service module.
feature_warnings.dmvpn: Requires the securityk9 technology package license on ISR G2; verify with 'show license' before use.
feature_warnings.ipsec: Requires the securityk9 technology package license on ISR G2; verify with 'show license' before use.
feature_warnings.zbf: Requires the securityk9 technology package license on ISR G2; verify with 'show license' before use.
feature_warnings.ikev2: IKEv2 requires IOS 15.1(1)T or later on this platform.
